128.reason: Error: If p is NULL, free(NULL) is safe but the logic is flawed; if p is not NULL, this frees the last node but Fr already freed it? Actually Fr frees the node in the neighbor's list, not this node. This free(p) is correct only if p is not NULL, but the while loop condition may exit with p being the last node (which is not freed in the loop), so this is okay, but the NULL check is missing.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  Error: If p is NULL, free(NULL) is safe but the logic is flawed; if p is not NULL, this frees the last node but Fr already freed it? This free(p) is correct only if p is not NULL, but the while loop condition may exit with p being the last node (which is not freed in the loop), so this is okay, but the NULL check is missing.

145.reason: Error: This frees q only when the while loop exits without finding v, but if v is found earlier, the function returns. However, if v is not found and q is the last node, this frees it, but the caller (DelVer) also tries to free p (which is the same node) leading to double free.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  Frees an incorrect node or NULL pointer, causing memory corruption or crash.
